sn46.14:2.2: Accurately reporting symptoms is a characteristic of a good patient (AN 5.123).
sn46.14:4.3: This discourse and the next two are included in the Sinhalese Maha Pirit Pota. Monks often recite them for recovery from illness. In Thailand, a set of verses known as the Bojjhaṅga-paritta are recited.
